summary: Konekt Patch Round 3 - All 6 verification gates PASSED. Invoice consolidation verified. 16/17 backend tests passed (1 minor routing issue). All UI flows verified working.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - route conflicts with /api/admin/orders/{order_id}. Use /api/admin/orders-ops instead.
minor.note: This is a routing order issue in admin_facade_routes.py. The /orders-ops endpoint works correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: customer_invoice_routes.py only queries db.invoices_v2 (no dual reads)
AIChatWidget.jsx line 113 correctly hides on /admin and /partner paths
PartnerLayout.jsx correctly shows affiliate section only for affiliate partners (isAffiliate flag)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 6 verification gates passed: Gate 1 (Customer invoices table), Gate 2 (Invoice drawer with branded header), Gate 3 (Customer orders table), Gate 4 (Vendor fulfillment queue), Gate 5 (Admin finance queue with detail panel), Gate 6 (AI chat widget hidden on admin/partner pages, visible on customer pages). Invoice consolidation verified - all backend code uses invoices_v2 exclusively. Vendor sidebar has no affiliate section for non-affiliate partners.

GATE_1_CUSTOMER_INVOICES.details: Customer invoices page at /dashboard/invoices shows full-width table with Date, Invoice, Type, Amount, Status, Action columns. 3 invoices displayed.

GATE_2_INVOICE_DRAWER.details: Invoice drawer opens on row click with branded header showing 'Invoice Preview' and Konekt branding. Shows Bill To, Invoice Summary, Line Items, Subtotal/VAT/Total, Download Invoice button.

GATE_3_CUSTOMER_ORDERS.details: Customer orders page at /dashboard/orders shows full-width table with Date, Order, Type, Payment, Fulfillment, Action columns. 19 orders displayed.

GATE_4_VENDOR_FULFILLMENT.details: Vendor fulfillment queue at /partner/fulfillment shows jobs with tabs (All Jobs, Pending, Accepted, In Progress, Completed, Issues). Multiple jobs displayed with status badges.

GATE_5_ADMIN_FINANCE_QUEUE.details: Admin finance queue at /admin/finance-queue shows 'Payments Queue' with 46 proofs. Split view layout with list and detail panel. Shows customer names, amounts, dates, status badges.

GATE_6_AI_CHAT_VISIBILITY.details: AI chat widget IS visible on customer pages (/dashboard/*). AI chat widget is NOT visible on admin pages (/admin/*) and partner pages (/partner/*). Verified via AIChatWidget.jsx line 113.

ADMIN_ORDERS_OPS.details: Admin orders at /admin/orders-ops shows 73 orders with search and status filter. Split view layout.

VENDOR_SIDEBAR_NO_AFFILIATE.details: Partner/Vendor sidebar does NOT show affiliate section items when logged in as vendor (demo.partner@konekt.com). Only shows: Dashboard, My Catalog, Create Listing, Stock Table, Bulk Upload, Fulfillment Queue, Settlements, Vendor Dashboard, Help.

INVOICE_CONSOLIDATION.details: All invoice APIs use invoices_v2 collection exclusively. Verified in customer_invoice_routes.py (line 57), admin_flow_fixes_routes.py, and collection_mode_service.py.

CUSTOMER_INVOICE_TABLE_LAYOUT.details: Customer invoice list uses full-width table layout (not cards). Table has proper columns: Date, Invoice, Type, Amount, Status, Action.
